close_reason: Merged into turnkey-tz0 - tool path injection is part of the script generation
description: The use_turnkey function needs to know paths to godeps-gen, pydeps-gen, rustdeps-gen, uv. These should be injected from Nix rather than assuming they're in PATH. Consider using environment variables set by the flake.
title: Make dependency tool paths configurable in use_turnkey
